title: Hotbar Inventory Transfer
description: This mod lets you instantly send items from your hotbar back to your inventory without ever having to open it.
body:
![Hotbar Inventory Transfer mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b11c7c0dd414016372929f649f3b4e32ad33983.gif) _Check out [Inventory Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-overlay) for the inventory display!_
FEATURES
One-Key ActionPress a single key to move items from your hotbar to inventory
Smart StackingAutomatically stacks items with existing non-full stacks before using empty slots
Overflow HandlingProperly manages item overflow when stacking, ensuring no items are lost or duplicated
No Inventory Screen NeededKeep your eyes on the game while organizing your items
HOW TO USE
- Hold any item in your hotbar. - Press ![R](https://img.shields.io/badge/R-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff). - The item instantly moves to your inventory. Stacking with matching items first, then finding empty slots.
CONFIGURATION
Changing the Keybind: - Go to Options → Controls → Key Binds - Scroll to the "Hotbar Inventory Transfer" category - Click on "Transfer Hotbar Item" and press your desired key
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API
CLIENT-SIDE ONLY
All functionality is done client-side and is compatible with vanilla servers.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
